reference_basis: official and public meteorological radar provider references

providers.name: UK Radar Reflectivity
providers.endpoint_notes: Only a provider radar page/source URL is known. Exact image, WMS, API, or tile endpoint still needs discovery.
providers.notes: Met Office public maps are rendered imagery; use an approved DataHub or image feed with a declared palette mapping.

providers.name: Ireland Radar Reflectivity
providers.attribution: Met Eireann / Met Office where applicable
providers.endpoint_notes: Only a provider radar page/source URL is known. Exact image, WMS, API, or tile endpoint still needs discovery.
providers.notes: Configure an approved Met Eireann or Met Office image/WMS endpoint with a declared palette mapping.

providers.name: Europe OPERA/CIRRUS Rain Rate
providers.endpoint_notes: Active provider: EUMETNET OPERA/CIRRUS public 5-minute maximum-reflectivity frame list decoded from the labelled dBZ palette.

preferred_raw_product.name: OPERA NIMBUS Instantaneous Rain Rate
preferred_raw_product.notes: Use this product instead of CIRRUS when a reachable ORD/EWC rolling-cache URL is available; it is already rain rate and avoids reflectivity conversion.

providers.notes: Active public Europe layer. Replace with OPERA NIMBUS rain-rate raw products when a reachable ORD/EWC endpoint is available.

providers.name: Canada Radar Reflectivity
providers.attribution: Environment and Climate Change Canada / MSC GeoMet
providers.endpoint_notes: Active provider: MSC GeoMet WMS rain precipitation-rate layer converted from the official linear legend.
providers.notes: MSC GeoMet is free and anonymous, but a layer name and legend-to-intensity mapping must be selected.

providers.name: Australia Radar Reflectivity
providers.endpoint_notes: Only a provider radar page/source URL is known. Exact image, WMS, API, or tile endpoint still needs discovery.
providers.notes: Use an approved BoM radar image endpoint and palette mapping.

providers.name: Japan Radar Intensity
providers.endpoint_notes: Active provider: JMA nowcast time feed and hrpns raster tiles are stitched into numeric Gusty packs.
providers.notes: Configure the selected JMA image endpoint and legend mapping.

providers.name: Germany Radar Intensity
providers.endpoint_notes: DWD open radar directories expose RADOLAN/RADVOR products; needs product-specific decoder or image mapping.
providers.notes: DWD open data can provide stronger numeric options; configure either a decoded image or preprocessed endpoint.

providers.name: Netherlands Radar Reflectivity
providers.endpoint_notes: KNMI Data Platform radar reflectivity composites. May require API key/header depending on access policy.
providers.notes: KNMI radar reflectivity composites are a good numeric candidate; configure an accessible product endpoint.

providers.name: France Radar Intensity
providers.endpoint_notes: Only a provider radar page/source URL is known. Exact image, WMS, API, or tile endpoint still needs discovery.
providers.notes: Configure an approved Meteo-France public data product or image endpoint.

providers.name: Spain Radar Intensity
providers.endpoint_notes: AEMET OpenData endpoint normally requires an API key.
providers.notes: AEMET OpenData often needs an API key; configure the endpoint and palette mapping if enabled.

providers.name: Hong Kong Radar Intensity
providers.endpoint_notes: Only a provider radar page/source URL is known. Exact image, WMS, API, or tile endpoint still needs discovery.
providers.notes: Configure the HKO radar endpoint and legend mapping.
